text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
392 
PRE_ICL_MOPP_COINS_OS 
LABEL: 
Pre-ICL Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 
1- or 3-months) on this tier, using mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the pre-initial 
coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT
